upstream_revision: MASSIVE dataset 1.0; alexa/massive main commit f966f21846043aabef9b0f974fa7970027f43738; archive Last-Modified 2022-06-08T23:56:32Z; raw SHA-256: 7df623fd2d300a4d235d6ee5bd396c9a28258d3a0ccb29abdb054506eba153f8
attribution: MASSIVE dataset, Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates; localized from the CC BY 4.0 SLURP text dataset; cite FitzGerald et al. (2022) and Bastianelli et al. (2020).
modification_notice: Extracted only id, partition, and Simplified Chinese utterance text from the checksum-pinned zh-CN JSONL member, applied Unicode NFC and whitespace normalization, removed exact within-source duplicate utterances, and added input-only candidate metadata; worker identifiers, judgments, intents, slot annotations, converter output, and expected text were excluded.
known_biases: MASSIVE zh-CN was localized from English SLURP voice-assistant utterances and is not independently authored organic Simplified Chinese traffic.
Many utterances are short commands or fragments that require input-only quality review before eligibility.
Wake words, names, services, and mixed Latin text may require over-conversion guard classification.
Intent, scenario, slot, worker, and judgment fields are excluded so domain and risk review uses candidate input text only.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
